Fraudulent archived payment records identified: 18 total. Mark the 2024-04-13 cust_042 burst (10 records) and the 2024-04-18 impossible-travel bursts for cust_032, cust_033, cust_034, and cust_035 (8 records). These records show cross-city purchases within minutes, and the 2024-04-13 burst also reuses the same card+device pairs across that rapid multi-city sequence.
